linting.notes: Pre-commit hooks configured with additional linters (detect-secrets, gitleaks, markdownlint, actionlint). Flake8 requires custom plugins from RedHatQE/flake8-plugins. Mypy currently has 18 type errors in utilities/*.py files.

env_vars: Tests require OpenShift/Kubernetes cluster access - most tests will skip without cluster
testing.mock_patterns: Extensive pytest fixtures for cluster resources, namespaces, models, inference services
testing.notes: Tests are integration tests requiring OpenShift cluster. Without cluster, tests skip gracefully. Pytest markers: smoke, tier1, tier2, tier3, parallel, slow, pre_upgrade, post_upgrade, component markers (llama_stack, rag, model_explainability). Test collection works (711 tests collected, 131 deselected). Actual test execution requires: OpenDataHub/RHOAI operators, Kubernetes cluster, model servers, inference services.

ci.notes: Tox runs two environments: unused-code (checks for unused functions with pyutils-unusedcode) and pytest (validates test collection and setup plan). Pre-commit hooks enforce: conventional commits, signed-off-by, flake8, ruff, mypy, gitleaks, detect-secrets, markdownlint, actionlint. Both CI checks run on pull_request events (opened, synchronize, reopened).

build.notes: Uses uv (modern Python package manager) instead of pip. Python 3.14 required. Dockerfile based on Fedora 43. System dependencies: python3, git, make, curl. Build creates container image with all dependencies.

conventions.test_naming: Test classes: TestClassName, test functions: test_function_name. Extensive use of pytest markers for categorization.
conventions.import_style: Absolute imports preferred. Utilities in utilities/ directory provide helper functions.
conventions.notes: Line length: 120 chars (ruff/flake8). Type hints enforced by mypy (strict settings). Conventional commit messages required. Signed-off-by required on all commits. Test markers document ownership and execution strategy.

setup_commands: dnf install -y python3.14 python3-pip git make curl

lint_commands.notes: Found 18 type errors in utilities/ - linter works correctly, code has type issues

test_commands.notes: 82 skipped, 131 deselected - tests skip without cluster
Both environments passed: unused-code (4.79s) + pytest (9.10s) = 14.51s total

container_recipe.notes: Tests require OpenShift/RHOAI cluster to actually run. Without cluster, test collection and validation work but tests skip. Flake8 requires: uv pip install flake8 'git+https://github.com/RedHatQE/flake8-plugins.git@v0.0.6' flake8-mutable. Mypy requires: uv pip install mypy types-PyYAML types-requests. Tox requires: uv pip install tox tox-uv python-utility-scripts.
